design_philosophy.name: The Modern Chronicle
design_philosophy.mood: A digital broadsheet. Crisp, high-contrast, text-forward but visually arresting. It feels like a legacy newspaper re-imagined for 2025.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Light Mode Dominant (reflecting the 'Morning Paper' feel). Dark Mode optional but secondary.

typography.installation_instructions: Import these fonts from Google Fonts in your index.css or index.html: Playfair Display (400, 700, 900), Public Sans (400, 500, 600), Rozha One (400), Mukta (300, 400, 500, 700).

primary.name: Teal Deep
primary.usage: Headers, Primary Buttons, Active States, Footer Background

secondary.name: Gold Sun
secondary.usage: Highlights, 'Featured' Tags, Accent Icons, Hover States

accent.name: Editorial Red
accent.usage: Live Badges, Breaking News Borders, Error States, Delete Actions

buttons.style: Rectangular, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No pills.
buttons.primary: bg-[#2a5a5a] text-white hover:bg-[#1f4444] shadow-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#f4c430] text-[#2a5a5a] hover:bg-[#e0b020] font-bold px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#2a5a5a] text-[#2a5a5a] hover:bg-[#2a5a5a] hover:text-white px-6 py-3 uppercase font-semibold

cards.style: Newspaper cutouts. Sharp edges, high contrast borders.
cards.news_card: bg-white border border-gray-200 hover:border-[#2a5a5a] transition-colors duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md group
cards.featured_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#2a5a5a] text-white border-none h-full

badges.category: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 hover:bg-[#f4c430] hover:text-[#2a5a5a] transition-colors
badges.live: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase bg-red-600 text-white animate-pulse

bento_hero.description: Asymmetrical grid for top stories. 1 Hero + 3-4 Supporting.
bento_hero.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-1 md:gap-4

classes.sidebar: md:col-span-4 space-y-8 border-l border-gray-100 pl-0 md:pl-8

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-t-4 border-[#2a5a5a]' for section headers to evoke the 'folded newspaper' look.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain on the '#faf9f6' background to simulate paper texture.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist. 'shadow-sm' for cards. 'shadow-xl' for sticky headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use strictly minimalist icons.
Use 'date-fns' for formatting dates in 'PPP' format (e.g., 'August 12, 2024').
Ensure ALL text is high contrast. No light gray on white.
For the Rich Text Editor, use a library like 'React Quill' or 'Tiptap'. Style it to match the 'Paper' aesthetic.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the Featured News section on the Home Page.
The 'Reporter Dashboard' should feel like a 'Newsroom' - functional, dense, data-rich.
The 'Public View' should feel like a 'Morning Paper' - spacious, readable, serif-heavy.

general: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Create depth through z-index and subtle borders.
No universal 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.
Use 2-3x more spacing than usual for breathing room.
components: Prioritize shadcn/ui but customize the radius to 'sm' or 'none'.
